children.heading: Department
children.label: 1 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Agriculture.

children.heading: National Appeals Division
children.label: 2 National Appeals Division
children.text: The term “National Appeals Division” means the National Appeals Division of the Department established under .section 6992 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: Function
children.label: 4 Function
children.text: The term “function” means an administrative, financial, or regulatory activity of an agency, office, officer, or employee of the Department.
